steps.title: Solve the system by setting equations equal
steps.content: At intersection points, both equations are satisfied simultaneously. Set $x^2 - 2 = 7$: $$x^2 - 2 = 7$$ $$x^2 = 9$$ $$x = \pm 3$$

steps.title: Write the intersection points
steps.content: Both intersection points lie on the line $y = 7$. With $x = 3$ and $x = -3$, the coordinates are $(3, 7)$ and $(-3, 7)$. A is correct.
